creator: no-reply@freebsd.org
text:
Is there any effort to upgrade www/qt5-webengine to make www/py-qt5-webengine like it? Or if it's so hard, why not temporarily roll back py-qt5? 

Look, www/qutebrowser has been dead for 3 months already. I don't know about other folks here but I'm unable to update my ports because I'd be left without a browser here. Why does this have to be so hard?
